Hearing Re Judgments And Hearing Re Objections To The Court'S Trial Rulings.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:for plaintiff, John Zanghi and Francisco Torres; for defendants, Stephen Collier and Karen Hull. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. The court hears oral arguments and convey's it's intentions as to the Motions for Stays and the Motions for Judgments Notwithstanding the Verdicts. The motions for JNOV are denied. Execution on the UD judgments in actions 189381 and 189621 are stayed and the outstanding Writs of Possession are suspended. Defense counsel, Mr. Collier, is to prepare judgments.

Hearing Re Judgments And Hearing Re Objections To The Court'S Trial Rulings.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2002 Continued To Apr-02-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Lee Batara. APPEARANCES: Francisco Torres, Esq., and John Zhangi, Esq., for the plaintiff; Steven Collier, Esq., for the defendants. This hearing relates to this action and to Action's #'s 189621 and 189381. The court indicates its proposed forms of judgments and sets April 2, 2002, at 9:00 AM, in Department 210 for further hearing and hearing on defendants' motions to stay execution of the judgments in 189621 and 189381.
